urdu transliteration text: May Kar Rahaa Zikr Alamdar baar baar
english translation text: I was remembering the flag bearer again and again

urdu transliteration text: Meesum(AS) Ne Khud Pinhaye Mujhe Haar Baar Baar.
english translation text: Maysum, himself put the garland on me.

urdu transliteration text: Shano Ko Dekhtha Tha Alamdar Baar Baar.
english translation text:
When Ali (a.s.) would talk about the flag in the house, Abbas’s eyes would glance at his shoulders again and again.
Ghar Mein Ali(AS) Jo Karte The Parcham Ki Guftgu.

urdu transliteration text:
Kitni Bulandiyon Pe Hain Abbas(As) Ke Alam
Kehte Hain Masjidon Ke Yeh Minar Baar Baar.
english translation text: How high flies the flag of Abbas.Say the Minarets of Masjids

urdu transliteration text:
Main Ne Ali(AS) Ke Ishq Ka Soda Nahi Kiya.
Aaye The Mere Pas Kharedar Baar Baar.
english translation text: I did not sell my love of Ali (a.s.)Although buyers came again and again

urdu transliteration text:
Jitnaa chuppa engai wo sitamgaar baar baar
Utna hasegi kabe ki dewaar baar baar
english translation text: However much the oppressors hid it. The walls of the Ka’ba will laugh that much.
